Our Gallery

About Us

Nestled in the heart of this spiritual and cultural center, our residency combines comfort with a serene ambiance, providing a unique hospitality experience. Conveniently located just 0.8 km from the renowned Arunachaleswarar Shiva Temple and a mere 300 feet from the tranquil Ramana Ashram.

Our Features

  • Luxurious A/C Rooms
  • Prime Location
  • 24/7 Room Service
  • Free Wi-Fi
  • Modern Amenities
SS Paradise Residency

Experience luxury and comfort in the heart of Tiruvannamalai.
